sentences.target: Ich zünde die Kerze im Bad an.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈtsʏndə diː ˈkɛʁtsə ɪm baːt an/

translations.de: Ich zünde die Kerze im Bad an.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈtsʏndə diː ˈkɛʁtsə ɪm baːt an/
translations.en: I’m lighting the candle in the bathroom.
translations.es: Estoy encendiendo la vela en el baño.
translations.fr: J’allume la bougie dans la salle de bain.
translations.pt: Estou acendendo a vela no banheiro.
translations.he: אני מדליק את הנר בחדר האמבטיה.
translations.vi: Tôi đang thắp nến trong phòng tắm.
translations.nl: Ik steek de kaars aan in de badkamer.
translations.hi: मैं बाथरूम में मोमबत्ती जला रहा हूँ.
translations.id: Saya menyalakan lilin di kamar mandi.
translations.ja: 浴室でろうそくに火をつけている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (1st sg, pres, indicative) of the separable verb ‘anzünden’; selects an accusative object (‘die Kerze’).
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; marks ‘Kerze’ as definite direct object.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of ‘zünde’.
Preposition (contraction of ‘in dem’) governing dative; introduces a locative PP.
Common noun, neuter; object of the preposition ‘im’ (dative singular).
Separable verbal particle completing the verb meaning (‘anzünden’ = ‘to light’); placed in clause-final position.

sentences.target: Die Kerze flackert bei offenem Fenster.

translations.de: Die Kerze flackert bei offenem Fenster.
translations.en: The candle flickers with the window open.
translations.es: La vela titila con la ventana abierta.
translations.fr: La bougie vacille avec la fenêtre ouverte.
translations.it: La candela tremola con la finestra aperta.
translations.zh-Hans: 窗户开着时，蜡烛的火焰会摇曳。
translations.yue: 開住窗嘅時候，蠟燭火會搖曳。
translations.pt: A vela tremula com a janela aberta.
translations.vi: Nến lập lòe khi cửa sổ mở.
translations.ar: الشمعة تومض عندما تكون النافذة مفتوحة.
translations.nl: De kaars flakkert met het raam open.
translations.hu: A gyertya pislákol, amikor nyitva van az ablak.
translations.hi: खिड़की खुली होने पर मोमबत्ती टिमटिमाती है.
translations.el: Το κερί τρεμοπαίζει με το παράθυρο ανοιχτό.
translations.nb: Stearinlyset flimrer når vinduet er åpent.
translations.id: Api lilin bergetar saat jendela terbuka.
translations.sv: Ljuset flämtar när fönstret är öppet.
translations.ro: Lumânarea pâlpâie când fereastra e deschisă.
translations.cs: Svíčka poblikává, když je okno otevřené.
translations.da: Stearinlyset flimrer, når vinduet er åbent.
translations.fi: Kynttilä väreilee, kun ikkuna on auki.
translations.ja: 窓が開いていると、ろうそくの火が揺らめく。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; marks the subject noun.
Common noun, feminine; subject of ‘flackert’ (nominative).
Finite intransitive verb (3rd sg, pres); predicates the subject’s action/state.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a circumstantial PP (‘bei offenem Fenster’ = with the window open).
Attributive adjective, dative neuter singular (strong inflection); modifies ‘Fenster’.
Common noun, neuter; object of the preposition ‘bei’ (dative).

sentences.target: Wir stellen die Kerze auf den Tisch.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈʃtɛlən diː ˈkɛʁtsə aʊf deːn tɪʃ/

translations.de: Wir stellen die Kerze auf den Tisch.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈʃtɛlən diː ˈkɛʁtsə aʊf deːn tɪʃ/
translations.en: We put the candle on the table.
translations.es: Ponemos la vela sobre la mesa.
translations.fr: Nous posons la bougie sur la table.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把蜡烛放在桌子上。
translations.yue: 我哋將蠟燭擺喺枱上面。
translations.he: אנחנו שמים את הנר על השולחן.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đặt cây nến lên bàn.
translations.nl: We zetten de kaars op tafel.
translations.hi: हम मोमबत्ती मेज पर रखते हैं.
translations.el: Βάζουμε το κερί πάνω στο τραπέζι.
translations.id: Kami menaruh lilin di atas meja.
translations.ja: テーブルにろうそくを置く。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject.
Finite main verb (1st pl, pres); transitive verb taking ‘die Kerze’ as accusative object and a directional PP.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; marks ‘Kerze’ as direct object.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of ‘stellen’.
Preposition that can take accusative/dative; here with motion it governs accusative (‘auf den Tisch’ = onto the table).
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; agrees with ‘Tisch’ under directional ‘auf’.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition ‘auf’ (accusative marking direction).

sentences.target: Oma pustet die Kerze vorsichtig aus.

translations.de: Oma pustet die Kerze vorsichtig aus.
translations.en: Grandma carefully blows out the candle.
translations.es: La abuela apaga la vela con cuidado.
translations.it: La nonna spegne la candela con attenzione.
translations.zh-Hans: 奶奶小心地把蜡烛吹灭。
translations.pt: A vovó apaga a vela com cuidado.
translations.vi: Bà thổi tắt cây nến một cách cẩn thận.
translations.nl: Oma blaast de kaars voorzichtig uit.
translations.hu: A nagymama óvatosan elfújja a gyertyát.
translations.hi: दादी सावधानी से मोमबत्ती बुझाती हैं.
translations.el: Η γιαγιά σβήνει προσεκτικά το κερί.
translations.ja: おばあちゃんがろうそくをそっと吹き消す。

tokens.explanation: Common noun (kinship term) used as a form of address/name; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (3rd sg, pres) of the separable verb ‘auspusten’ (to blow out); takes an accusative object.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; marks ‘Kerze’ as direct object.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of ‘pustet’.
Adverb of manner modifying the verb phrase; indicates how the action is performed.
Separable verbal particle completing the verb meaning (‘auspusten’ = blow out); clause-final particle.

jp: Ich zünde die Kerze im Bad an.
Die Kerze flackert bei offenem Fenster.
Wir stellen die Kerze auf den Tisch.
Oma pustet die Kerze vorsichtig aus.

de: Ich zünde die Kerze im Bad an.
Die Kerze flackert bei offenem Fenster.
Wir stellen die Kerze auf den Tisch.
Oma pustet die Kerze vorsichtig aus.

en: I’m lighting the candle in the bathroom.
The candle flickers with the window open.
We put the candle on the table.
Grandma carefully blows out the candle.
